creator: gordon@FreeBSD.org
text: The patch for 11.1-RELEASE-p8 (https://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/SA-18:03/speculative_execution-amd64-11.patch) includes the definition of CPUCTL_EVAL_CPU_FEATURES in sys/sys/cpuctl.h. I'm pretty sure there is something with your environment that did not patch properly. Can you verify your patch correctly applied (no .rej in your tree) and try running a clean buildworld?
